articles.title: Saylor signals another Bitcoin buy, after hinting at selling in Q1 earnings call
articles.description: Strategy's average cost per Bitcoin is about $75,537, and its BTC investment is up about 7.6% at the time of this writing, according to data from the company.

articles.title: Ethereum down 35% versus Bitcoin in a year: Will the ETH price downtrend continue?
articles.description: Ethereum’s ongoing downtrend against Bitcoin mirrors the bearish structure seen in 2024–2025, raising the risk of another 40% decline.

articles.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Lime’s IPO gamble

articles.title: We’re feeling cynical about xAI’s big deal with Anthropic

articles.title: Bitcoin holds $80K into weekly close as traders say BTC price dip not yet over
articles.description: Bitcoin avoided a weekend drop as $80,000 stayed in place, but traders saw BTC price action dipping below before continuing higher.

articles.title: Agentic commerce will run on crypto rails, PayPal and Google reps tell Consensus Miami
articles.description: Senior figures from PayPal and Google Cloud said open payment protocols, machine-readable merchant catalogs and multi-party crypto custody are needed to scale agentic commerce.

articles.title: Bored Ape NFTs are finally making a comeback as crypto traders rediscover their appetite for risk
articles.description: BAYC floor prices have doubled in a month as traders rotate back into speculative crypto bets, reviving hopes of a broader NFT recovery.

articles.title: Three young DeFi apps return $100M in revenue to token holders in 30 days
articles.description: Hyperliquid, EdgeX and Pump.fun returned a combined $96 million to token holders in 30 days, as the crypto community shifts its focus from transaction volumes to real earnings.

articles.title: South Korea crypto holdings halve in a year as investors turn to stock market
articles.description: South Korean crypto holdings fell to $41 billion from $83 billion in just over a year as investors shifted to stocks.

articles.title: Bitcoin price may dip toward $70K as Fed estimates hotter inflation print
articles.description: BTC’s rising wedge points to a possible drop toward $70,000 as Strategy pauses buying and inflation cools Fed rate-cut hopes.

articles.title: Trump Media posts $406M quarterly loss as crypto bets turn sour
articles.description: Trump Media’s $405.9 million net loss was driven mostly by unrealized losses on Bitcoin bought at last summer’s peak and Cronos tokens acquired through a Crypto.com deal.
